nasb.text: And I said, ‘Lord, they themselves understand that in one synagogue after another I used to imprison and beat those who believed in You.

esv.text: And I said, ‘Lord, they themselves know that in one synagogue after another I imprisoned and beat those who believed in you.

cnv.text: 我說：‘主啊，他們知道我曾把信你的人監禁起來，又在各會堂拷打他們，

ccb.text: 我说，‘主啊！他们都知道我从前搜遍各会堂，逮捕、毒打信你的人。

csbs.text: “我就说：‘主啊，他们知道我曾经到各会堂，把信靠你的人关进监狱，还鞭打他们。
